title: Lumii's Amarite Scissors
description: A resource pack that changes Amarite longswords to a scissor-themed sword.
body:
A simple resource pack that changes **[Amarite](https://modrinth.com/mod/amarite)**'s Longsword and Discs to scissor themed variants of said weapons, including textures for the Longsword itself, and Amarite Discs! ![A player holding an Amarite Longsword](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d9ba05c2ccee01cd1543821d90105ee2a3bfc23.png)

Inspired by KindlingCinder's "[Scissored Amarite Longswords](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/scissored-amarite-longswords)" texture pack.
